SR._description: Storage Ring: Main synchrotron light source operating at 1.9 GeV. 12-sector ring with beam position monitors, corrector magnets, RF cavities, and beam diagnostics.

BPM._description: Beam Position Monitors: Non-invasive electrostatic pickups measuring beam position in horizontal (X) and vertical (Y) planes. 96 BPMs (8 per sector).

Monitor._description: Position readback values. Measured beam positions.

Sum._description: Total button signal intensity. Proportional to beam current.

HCM._description: Horizontal Corrector Magnets: Small dipole steering magnets for horizontal beam position adjustments. 72 correctors (6 per sector).

OnControl._description: Enable/disable control for corrector magnet power supply.

VCM._description: Vertical Corrector Magnets: Small dipole steering magnets for vertical beam position adjustments. 72 correctors (6 per sector).

QF._description: Focusing Quadrupoles: Positive gradient quadrupole magnets. 24 total (2 per sector).

QD._description: Defocusing Quadrupoles: Negative gradient quadrupole magnets. 24 total (2 per sector).

SF._description: Focusing Sextupoles: Positive sextupole magnets for chromaticity correction. 24 total (2 per sector).

SD._description: Defocusing Sextupoles: Negative sextupole magnets for chromaticity correction. 24 total (2 per sector).

DCCT._description: DC Current Transformer: Measures total stored beam current with high precision.

DIPOLE._description: Bending Dipole Magnets: Main dipoles bending beam around the ring. 36 total (3 per sector).

RF._description: Radio Frequency System: Provides energy to compensate for synchrotron radiation losses. Operating at 499.654 MHz.

ION-PUMP._description: Ion Pumps: Sputter-ion pumps providing UHV pumping. 72 pumps (6 per sector).

GAUGE._description: Vacuum Pressure Gauges: Ionization gauges for independent pressure monitoring. 24 gauges (2 per sector).

BR._description: Booster Ring: Accelerates beam from 150 MeV to 1.9 GeV before injection into storage ring. Compact ring with 4-fold symmetry.

BPM._description: Booster BPMs: Measure beam position during acceleration cycle.

DIPOLE._description: Booster dipole magnets. Ramped during acceleration.

QF._description: Booster quadrupoles for focusing during acceleration.
